title: callilepis retiefiae
intro: Callilepis retiefiae, also known as the leopard's bane, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Callilepis retiefiae include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant, typically in the form of infusions or decoctions, can be made by drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be used to treat a range of health conditions.
